tools.name: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails
tools.description: Open-source toolkit for adding programmable guardrails to LLM-based conversational systems. Extensible and customizable, integrating with LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex.

tools.name: Guardrails AI
tools.description: Python framework for building reliable AI applications with input/output guard detection and mitigation. Features a Hub of pre-built validators.

tools.name: LlamaFirewall (Meta)
tools.description: Open-source security-focused guardrail framework as a final layer of defense against AI agent security risks. Includes PromptGuard 2, Agent Alignment Checks, and CodeShield.
tools.target_audience: AI agent developers needing security layers

tools.name: LLM Guard (Protect AI)
tools.description: Open-source library providing security guardrails for LLM applications with input scanners and output scanners.

tools.name: Lakera Guard (Check Point)
tools.description: Runtime security platform protecting generative AI and LLM applications from prompt injection, data leakage, and harmful outputs. Acquired by Check Point in 2025.

tools.name: Cisco AI Defense (Robust Intelligence)
tools.description: Comprehensive AI security platform built on Robust Intelligence acquisition ($400M). Discover AI assets, detect vulnerabilities, and protect runtime applications.
tools.pricing: Subscription based on AI applications protected (Advantage / Validation Essentials / Runtime Essentials tiers). Free Explorer Edition available.

tools.name: Zenity
tools.description: Continuously monitors AI agent activity at runtime, breaking interactions into granular steps and flagging suspicious behavior.

tools.name: CalypsoAI (F5 acquisition pending)
tools.description: AI security platform protecting generative AI applications and LLMs at inference time using agentic red-teaming, real-time defense, and continuous observability.

tools.name: Promptfoo (OpenAI)
tools.description: Open-source tool for testing prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming and vulnerability scanning for AI. Joined OpenAI in March 2026.
tools.pricing: Free / Open Source (MIT) + Commercial tier with SOC2/ISO 27001

tools.name: Garak (NVIDIA)
tools.description: LLM vulnerability scanner from NVIDIA's AI Red Team with 120+ probe modules. Focused on creative payload generation and behavioral attack simulation.
tools.target_audience: Security researchers and AI red teamers

tools.name: Pillar Security
tools.description: Comprehensive AI security platform covering the entire AI software lifecycle. Named Representative Vendor in Gartner's 2026 Market Guide for Guardian Agents.

tools.name: HiddenLayer
tools.description: Security platform for real-time detection and prevention of adversarial attacks against AI models. Recently added agentic runtime security capabilities.

tools.name: Prompt Security
tools.description: AI security company helping manage GenAI risks and secure LLM-based applications against prompt injection and data leakage.

tools.name: Lasso Security
tools.description: Enterprise AI security platform providing visibility, control, and protection across AI models, agents, and apps.

tools.name: WitnessAI
tools.description: Unified AI security and governance platform. Detects unregistered AI agents and observes command flows between LLMs and agents.

tools.name: Cranium AI
tools.description: AI governance and security platform for inventorying, testing, and protecting AI/ML ecosystems. Creates AI Bill of Materials.

tools.name: AccuKnox AI-Security 2.0
tools.description: Identity-powered Zero Trust platform to secure AI models, agents, and data. Launched AI-Security 2.0 at RSAC 2026.

tools.name: Microsoft Agent 365 / Defender / Entra / Purview
tools.description: Microsoft's comprehensive agentic AI security stack. Agent 365 GA May 1, 2026 - control plane for agent visibility, security, and governance.
tools.pricing: Part of Microsoft 365 / Azure security licensing

tools.name: Okta for AI Agents
tools.description: First-class non-human identity management for AI agents. Expands Universal Directory to treat AI agents as independent identities.

tools.name: BeyondTrust AI Security
tools.description: Unified identity security platform extending to AI agents. Discovers, assesses, and controls risks across AI agent workloads.

tools.name: Aembit
tools.description: Workload identity and access management platform extending to agentic AI. Focused on non-human identity security.

tools.name: Arcjet
tools.description: Inline defense against prompt injection at the application boundary. Detects hostile prompts before they reach AI models.

tools.name: Thales AI Security Fabric
tools.description: Monitors LLM-powered applications in real time for prompt injection, jailbreaking, and data leakage across cloud and on-premises.

tools.name: CrowdStrike Falcon AI (AIDR)
tools.description: AI Detection and Response (AIDR) stops direct and indirect prompt injection attacks with 99% efficacy at sub-30ms latency.

tools.name: Trend Micro TrendAI
tools.description: Works with NVIDIA OpenShell to bring governance, risk visibility, and runtime enforcement to the AI agent lifecycle.

tools.name: Protect AI Guardian (Palo Alto Networks)
tools.description: ML security gateway scanning models for malicious payloads before production. Acquired by Palo Alto Networks in July 2025.

tools.name: Langfuse (Security & Guardrails)
tools.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform with security and guardrails integration capabilities for observability-driven security.

tools.name: Gravitee AI Gateway
tools.description: API management platform extending to AI agent security with gateway-level controls and State of AI Agent Security reporting.
key_features: state of AI agent security research

key_acquisitions_2024_2025: Palo Alto Networks acquired Protect AI (2025)
